description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, slender barrel, featuring a mounted telescopic scope for precision aiming. The stock is made of dark-stained wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, providing a classic and robust appearance. The barrel and receiver are constructed from dark metal, with the barrel extending well beyond the wooden fore-end. The scope is mounted on top of the receiver, with adjustment knobs and a matte black finish, indicating its use for long-range targeting. The trigger guard and bolt handle are visible, both made of metal, and the rifle appears to have an internal magazine. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military sniper rifles, suitable for both urban and rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long metal barrel, and a mounted telescopic scope, designed for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the scope aligned above the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the wooden stock, metal barrel, and the mounted scope.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the scope's mounting position.
